1871970.name: Rise for the Fight - Early Access
1871970.description:
Rise for the Fight is an upcoming Cartoon Multiplayer FPS game being developed by Reece Makes Games.

Rise for the Fight's core gameplay is all about guns, kills, and damage. Deal damage, get kills, and gain multikills to acquire:

Upgrade Points!

Use your Upgrade Points to upgrade your gun's rate of fire and ammo capacity, or exchange your equipped gun for a new gun.

New weapons can be acquired at the Gungen Vending Machines located around the map. It will cost you 5 Upgrade Points to get a random weapon. Upgrade Points will be refunded, and more ammo will be supplied (when applicable) if you are given the same weapon.


Keep yourself aware at all times, and be careful because if you die, your purchased weapons and gun stats will be reset...

Features:

- Expansive and Expressive Character Customization, with more coming in the future.

- Unique Twists to Classic Game Modes.

- Several Simple yet Unique Maps to fight on.

- Over 10 Different Guns to play with.

- Singleplayer Mode (Requires Internet Connection to play)

Controls (KEYBOARD AND MOUSE):

- WASD = Move
- Left Shift + WASD = Sprint
- C = Crouch
- Spacebar = Jump
- Left Click = Shoot
- Right Click = Aim
- R = Reload
- F = Melee
- G = Equip Grenade / Swap back to Gun
- H = Heal
- E = Interact
- 1/2/3 = Upgrade Gun Stats
- Tab = Scoreboard
- Esc = Enter/Exit Pause Menu

Controls (STEAM INPUT):

- Left Joystick = Move
- Left Joystick Click (HOLD) = Run
- Right Joystick = Look / Move Cursor
- Right Joystick Click (HOLD) = Crouch
- A = Jump
- B = Heal
- X = Reload / Interact
- Y = Toggle Weapon Inventory
- Left Trigger (HOLD) = Aim
- Right Trigger = Shoot / Use Grenades / Interact with Menus
- Left Bumper = Equip Grenades
- Right Bumper = Melee
- DPad Left = Upgrade Option 1
- DPad Up = Upgrade Option 2
- DPad Right = Upgrade Option 3
- Select (HOLD) = Scoreboard
- Start = Enter/Exit Pause Menu

Notes:

- This game's servers are set to US East, so if you are in a different region, you may experience high ping.

- The Server has a maximum player capacity of 100. This will be expanded on if needed.

- Expect bugs to be present in this game, as it's in early development.

If you come across any issues with the game, please submit feedback in the comments on what can be improved.

Have Fun!

-Reece
1871970.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
